hero.name: Maria Alejandra Montilla Diaz
hero.description: Software Engineering student passionate about creating elegant and functional digital experiences that generate real impact.

about.title: About me
about.p1: I am a software engineering student and I love everything related to technology, especially web development and creating beautiful things that work well. I like to learn at my own pace, try new things and face challenges, even if sometimes I have to look for a thousand solutions until something works.
about.p2: In addition to programming, I am also a manicurist, something that is an important part of my life. Thanks to that I have developed a lot of creativity, patience and attention to detail, things that I also apply when I design interfaces or work on my projects.
about.p3: I like things to look good, but also to work well, and I feel that this mixture between the visual and the technical is what represents me most. I am a calm, responsible and committed person, and although I am still learning, I always try to give my best in everything I do.

manicurist.title: Independent Manicurist
manicurist.desc: I provide personalized nail care and aesthetic services at home. Customer management, appointment scheduling, loyalty and independent business management. Development of responsibility, discipline and attention to detail skills.

admin_assistant.title: Administrative Assistance Assistant (Internship)
admin_assistant.desc: Performed 880 hours of practice. Support in document management, customer service, file organization and general administrative tasks.

customer_service.title: Customer Service Experience
customer_service.desc: I have developed effective communication, empathy and problem solving skills through direct interaction with customers.

nail_tech.title: Nail Aesthetic Experience
nail_tech.desc: Work for half a year in nail aesthetic services, strengthening technical and service skills.

software_eng.title: Software Engineering
software_eng.desc: Training in programming, software development, databases and design of technological solutions.

beauty.title: Labor Technician in Aesthetic Hand and Foot Care

secondary.title: Secondary Education
secondary.institution: Silveria Espinosa de Rendón School, Bogotá D.C.

testimonials.title: What they say about me
testimonials.t1: Sofía delivered an exceptional product that exceeded our expectations. Her attention to detail and ability to understand our needs was impressive.
testimonials.t2: Working with Sofía was an incredible experience. Her professionalism and technical skills are top notch. I would definitely recommend her.
testimonials.t3: A talented developer with an exceptional eye for design. Sofía transformed our vision into a beautiful and functional reality.

contact.title: Let's Work Together
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? I'd love to hear your idea and see how I can help.
contact.connectDesc: I'm always open to new opportunities and interesting projects. Feel free to reach out.
contact.name: Name
contact.successMsg: Thanks for your message! I'll get back to you soon.

nails.title: My Creative Side
nails.description: Besides development, I also dedicate myself to nail design, where I express my creativity and attention to detail.
